title: Robert Walker
compiled_truth: Robert Walker is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-01-13 to 2001-07-16), Robert Walker sent 19 and received 466 emails, totalling 485 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (12), [Sandi Braband](people/sandi-braband) (8), [Dan Hyvl](people/dan-hyvl) (5), [Kimberlee Bennick](people/kimberlee-bennick) (5), [Shonnie Daniel](people/shonnie-daniel) (5).
